stemHtml: "Integrated range" curves or tables are presented in the Aeroplane Operations Manuals. Their purpose is…

options.a: to determine the still air distance for a wind components varying with altitude.
options.b: to determine the flight time for a certain leg under consideration of temperature deviations.
options.c: to determine the fuel consumption for a certain still air distance considering the decreasing fuel flow with decreasing mass.
options.d: to determine the optimum speed considering the fuel cost as well as the time related cost of the aeroplane.
